relations.note: Cardinality limit refines the general CTA styling baseline drawn from the same source statement.

quotes: Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**
image/text split (≈40/60)
Email body width: **600px** fixed, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px so assembled sections butt cleanly.
Mobile breakpoint: **480px**; all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
Internal section grid: 12-column mental model; practical layouts are 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or image/text split (≈40/60).

rules.intent: Guarantee consistent, seamlessly assembled email canvases across breakpoints.
rules.rule_text: Email canvas is fixed at 600px width (size.canvas.email_body_width = 600px), centered, with sections rendering edge-to-edge so they butt cleanly during assembly. At the 480px mobile breakpoint (breakpoint.mobile = 480px), all multi-column layouts collapse to a single column. Internally, layouts follow a 12-column mental model realized as 1-col, 2-col (50/50), or an image/text split of ≈40/60 (ratio.grid.image_text_split = 40/60).

quotes: Section side padding: 24px
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px**
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.
Section side padding: 24px left/right (consistent across ALL sections — this is what makes assembly seamless).
Vertical rhythm: 8px base unit. All padding/margins are multiples of 8.
Section top/bottom internal padding: **32px** (each section owns its own top AND bottom padding; no external margins between sections — assembly is zero-gap stacking).
Heading → body gap: 16px. Paragraph → paragraph: 16px. Body → callout/CTA: 24px. Image → caption: 8px.

rules.intent: Enforce a single, predictable spacing system so independently authored sections assemble without visual seams or gaps.
rules.rule_text: All sections use consistent 24px left/right side padding (section.padding.sides = 24px) across every section, which is what makes stacked-section assembly seamless; full-bleed imagery/gradient backgrounds may run edge-to-edge to 600px but text within them still respects the 24px inset. Vertical rhythm follows an 8px base unit (spacing.base.8 = 8px), with every padding/margin value a multiple of 8: section top/bottom internal padding is 32px (section.padding.top_bottom = 32px), heading→body gap is 16px (spacing.gap.heading_body = 16px), paragraph→paragraph is 16px, body→callout/CTA gap is 24px (spacing.gap.body_callout = 24px), and image→caption gap is 8px. Each section owns its own top and bottom padding with no external margins between sections, so assembly is zero-gap stacking.

quotes: Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height**
corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic)
Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

Buttons/CTA **[GENERAL, contrast-checked to palette]:** Brand Blue #00529b background, White #ffffff text, Nunito Sans Bold 16px, padding 14px 32px, **min touch target 48px height** (brand accessibility rule: ≥48px clickable areas), corner radius 24px (fully rounded pill, echoing the rounded brand aesthetic). Secondary CTA: White background, 2px Brand Blue border, Brand Blue text, same metrics.

rules.intent: Ensure CTA buttons are visually consistent, brand-correct, and meet minimum tap-target accessibility.
rules.rule_text: Primary CTA buttons use a Brand Blue #00529b fill (cta.button.fill), White #ffffff label text (cta.button.label.color), Nunito Sans Bold at 16px (font.cta / type_scale.cta.16), 14px 32px padding (cta.button.padding), a fully rounded 24px pill radius (cta.button.radius = 24px), and must meet a minimum 48px touch-target height (size.touch_target.min_height = 48px) per brand accessibility guidance. Secondary CTAs use a White background with a 2px Brand Blue border (border.secondary_cta.brand_blue_2px) and Brand Blue text, keeping all other metrics identical to the primary CTA.

quotes: One primary CTA per section maximum.
One primary CTA per section maximum.

rules.intent: Prevent competing calls-to-action from diluting a single section's conversion focus.
rules.rule_text: Each section may contain at most one primary CTA button.
